title: Issue with our storage API in the EU and AU regions-will be fixed soon
excerpt:
Hi Dev community 
Currently, we have an issue with our storage API in the EU and AU regions. 
We identified the problem and are working on a fix. 
We will update you all as soon as this is resolved.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dev community

Currently, we have an issue with our storage API in the EU and AU regions.
We identified the problem and are working on a fix.
We will update you all as soon as this is resolved.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml: A fix was deployed to the EU and AU regions (US was not affected) and things should work normally again. We will keep monitoring, but please feel free to let us know if it’s not the case on your end.
